messages.content: The second killed attempt is committed and pushed at `3ac37b4`, with its timestamped activity record. No combinations or post-result tuning are being introduced.

Candidate 3’s COBA smoke is progressing normally with the isolated 0.001 learning rate: finite loss, active E population, and no skipped updates through the second epoch. I’m letting the same bounded local smoke finish both cells.

Candidate 3 passes its local smoke gate: COBA ends at 26.13 Hz E; PING at 3.36 Hz E and 19.00 Hz I, with finite training, exact split hashes, and no official-test alias file. The clean dry run resolves to exactly two jobs and creates none. I’m checkpointing this final short candidate before dispatch.
